name: The Way
description_short: The Way Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative in New Knoxville, Ohio, offering traditional credit union services to its members.
description_long: The Way Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union located in New Knoxville, Ohio, operating under NCUA insurance. Based on their website presence and contact information, they serve a specific membership base in the northwestern Ohio region. The institution provides standard credit union financial services typical of community-based credit unions, including share accounts and other member-focused products. What distinguishes The Way Credit Union is its hyperlocal presence and commitment to member service through direct contact rather than digital channels. The company explicitly states they do not provide online member services, requiring members to contact them directly by phone or in person. This reflects an older operational model focused on personal relationships and phone/walk-in banking rather than modern digital-first banking. For consumers seeking a traditional credit union experience with personal service, The Way Credit Union offers membership benefits. However, the lack of online banking services is a significant limitation in 2024, as most financial consumers expect digital access to accounts, transfers, and basic banking functions. Members should be prepared to conduct most business through phone (419-753-1312) or by visiting their physical location at 19100 East Shelby Road.
services: Share accounts (savings accounts for credit union members)
Share certificates (credit union equivalent of CDs)
Direct member contact and personal service
Annual member meetings and governance participation
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure keeps earnings focused on member benefits rather than shareholder profits
NCUA-insured institution providing federal protection for member deposits
Direct personal contact with staff available by phone during business hours
Hyperlocal presence serving the New Knoxville, Ohio community with deep roots
Traditional credit union model focused on member relationships over scale
Access to annual meeting materials and member governance participation
cons: No online banking or member services available—all transactions require phone or in-person contact
Website contains technical errors and lacks informative content about products or services
Limited accessibility for members who require digital banking for modern financial management
Geographically restricted membership likely limits growth and resource availability
No information provided about specific product offerings, rates, or terms on website
best_for: Local residents of New Knoxville and surrounding rural Ohio communities
Members who prefer in-person banking relationships and phone-based service
Consumers comfortable with traditional banking methods without digital channels
Those seeking membership in a small, community-focused credit union
diagnosis: The Way Credit Union is best suited for rural Ohio residents who prefer traditional, relationship-based banking without online services. The primary caveat is the complete absence of digital banking—prospective members must be comfortable conducting all financial business via phone calls or in-person visits, which is impractical for most modern consumers.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
